promotion_law: failure -> wound -> evidence -> lesson candidate -> validator -> human-authorized promotion -> permanent gate

lessons.observed_event: Latest pointer was published before all run artifacts existed.
lessons.diagnosis: Publication order was not transactionally gated.
lessons.lesson: Publish latest only after evidence, certificate, metrics, and reports exist.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Validate complete run artifacts before replacing latest.
lessons.authority_boundary: Artifact publication grants no transfer claim.

lessons.observed_event: Windows latest-pointer removal failed across link and directory types.
lessons.diagnosis: Removal logic assumed one filesystem object type.
lessons.lesson: Handle symlink, file, and directory removal explicitly.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Path utilities classify targets before replacement.
lessons.authority_boundary: Filesystem handling remains repository-local.

lessons.observed_event: Git scanned outside the repository boundary.
lessons.diagnosis: Git commands did not anchor an explicit root.
lessons.lesson: All Git calls use git -C with the repository root.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Operator commands remain root-bound.
lessons.authority_boundary: Root binding does not authorize commit or push.

lessons.observed_event: A critical installer depended on a missing bundle folder.
lessons.diagnosis: Bootstrap assumptions were not transplant-safe.
lessons.lesson: Critical launchers must run from any location or be paste-safe.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Entrypoints resolve and verify the repository root.
lessons.authority_boundary: Portability grants no external execution authority.

lessons.observed_event: A pasted PowerShell block failed on a top-level parameter declaration.
lessons.diagnosis: Script-file syntax was treated as paste-safe syntax.
lessons.lesson: Paste-safe scripts avoid unsupported top-level parameter patterns.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Public script mode is declared and tested.
lessons.authority_boundary: Script usability does not grant mutation authority.

lessons.observed_event: UTF-8 BOM content broke JSON loading.
lessons.diagnosis: Generated JSON encoding was inconsistent.
lessons.lesson: Write JSON and Markdown as UTF-8 without BOM.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Generated governance artifacts use normalized encoding.
lessons.authority_boundary: Encoding validity is not semantic correctness.

lessons.observed_event: Unicode console output crashed an operator surface.
lessons.diagnosis: Display output exceeded the active console encoding.
lessons.lesson: Operator output is ASCII-safe by default.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Decorative Unicode remains optional and bounded.
lessons.authority_boundary: Console rendering is operator UX only.

lessons.observed_event: README and runtime surfaces drifted after rapid changes.
lessons.diagnosis: Public and machine-readable surfaces evolved independently.
lessons.lesson: README, AGENTS, Loopbook, registry, and Nexus update together.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Promotion runs synchronized documentation gates.
lessons.authority_boundary: Documentation alignment is not code correctness.

lessons.observed_event: The loop began without an Observer surface.
lessons.diagnosis: Worker execution preceded human-visible state.
lessons.lesson: Launch Observer before Worker.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Agent CLI preserves observer-first ordering.
lessons.authority_boundary: Observation is read-only and grants no authority.

lessons.observed_event: PowerShell absorbed application loop logic.
lessons.diagnosis: Runtime behavior was split across language boundaries.
lessons.lesson: Python owns loop logic; shells launch only.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Public wrappers delegate to registered Python commands.
lessons.authority_boundary: Language ownership does not authorize execution.

lessons.observed_event: Engine patch notes accumulated in the repository root.
lessons.diagnosis: Release history lacked a bounded destination.
lessons.lesson: Release documents live under docs/releases/engine.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Root hygiene is checked before promotion.
lessons.authority_boundary: Repository hygiene is not release validation.

lessons.observed_event: Command registry, Loopbook, lessons, chart, and README described different loops.
lessons.diagnosis: Interconnected surfaces had no single validated geometry.
lessons.lesson: No feature promotes without route, lesson, chart, and README alignment.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Repository geometry validates nodes, edges, and loop order.
lessons.authority_boundary: Geometry alignment is not empirical validation.

lessons.observed_event: A launcher passed surface checks while containing invalid Python syntax.
lessons.diagnosis: Validation checked files and tokens but not executable syntax.
lessons.lesson: Compile executable Python entrypoints before promotion.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Agent CLI validation runs py_compile and complete compileall checks.
lessons.authority_boundary: Compilation proves syntax only, not correctness.

lessons.observed_event: An unconstrained neural predictor improved loss but still oversteered relative to a stable EWMA baseline.
lessons.diagnosis: The learned model was asked to own the full forecast despite a tiny normal-only training set.
lessons.lesson: Simple dynamical experts own the performance floor; neural fields earn bounded residual authority through held-out evidence.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Prediction uses an EWMA anchor, bounded innovation, correction shrinkage, and explicit parity tolerance.
lessons.authority_boundary: Baseline parity does not authorize memory, repair, topology, transfer, or safety claims.

lessons.observed_event: Raw reconstruction magnitude dominated anomaly scoring and inverted the ranking of unfamiliar states.
lessons.diagnosis: Uncalibrated one-sided metrics allowed a drifting decoder channel to overwhelm prediction, field, and latent evidence.
lessons.lesson: Awareness channels require normal-only robust calibration, two-sided surprise, bounded influence, and temporal corroboration.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Anomaly promotion uses multiscale top-two fusion and aggregate replay gates.
lessons.authority_boundary: Expanded observability is not consciousness and does not grant memory, repair, topology, or transfer authority.

lessons.observed_event: False-memory and replay metrics used denominators that made contamination appear zero and penalized correct anomaly rejection.
lessons.diagnosis: Promotion metrics were computed from derived columns rather than their eligible normal and anomalous populations.
lessons.lesson: Replay coverage is conditional on normal rows; false-memory contamination is conditional on anomaly rows.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Governance summaries and benchmark promotion gates expose mean and maximum contamination explicitly.
lessons.authority_boundary: Correct metric semantics improve evidence quality but do not grant live memory or general transfer authority.

lessons.observed_event: A multiscale sensor that transferred to NAB failed across NASA SMAP contextual and point-anomaly channels.
lessons.diagnosis: Scalar fusion treated target telemetry and sparse command/event context as interchangeable evidence; inherited test-based scaling also blocked clean promotion.
lessons.lesson: Cross-domain evolution requires typed relational context and source-level preprocessing lineage, not threshold relaxation.
lessons.future_behavior_change: NASA telemetry remains a diagnostic branch while clean-family transfer proceeds through UCR.
lessons.authority_boundary: A failed domain transfer grants no repair, memory, topology, or generalization authority.

lessons.observed_event: Pointwise state surprise failed on a short UCR shape anomaly while a subsequence discord transferred across an untouched series.
lessons.diagnosis: The anomaly's meaning lived in local shape and episode persistence rather than individual sample magnitude.
lessons.lesson: Tessera requires domain-matched sensing primitives; subsequence evidence may be carried forward causally but cannot bypass memory and forecasting gates.
lessons.future_behavior_change: UCR detection uses frozen window-24 discord and hold-12 event persistence while memory eligibility remains separately gated.
lessons.authority_boundary: A confirmed sensing primitive is not a transfer certificate or memory-promotion authority.

lessons.observed_event: Causal event quarantine succeeded on a long discovery anomaly but never activated for a two-sample confirmation anomaly missed by the shape sensor.
lessons.diagnosis: A window-24 subsequence detector was applied across incompatible anomaly durations.
lessons.lesson: Detection scale must be routed before shared episode and memory governance can operate.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Future UCR trials preregister duration-stratified point and subsequence sensors rather than claiming one universal window.
lessons.authority_boundary: Episode quarantine does not authorize memory promotion or universal anomaly claims.

lessons.observed_event: A maximum-of-sensors router confirmed point anomalies but degraded stronger subsequence evidence and over-restricted replay.
lessons.diagnosis: The router lacked abstention and reused detection confidence as memory confidence.
lessons.lesson: Sensor routing requires point, subsequence, and abstain outcomes; memory normality must be calibrated independently.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Future routers expose route confidence, disagreement, abstention, and separate memory eligibility.
lessons.authority_boundary: A confirmed sensor tile does not authorize universal routing or memory promotion.

lessons.observed_event: An abstaining router produced zero false memories on two confirmations but still reduced specialist AUC and missed the replay gate.
lessons.diagnosis: Abstention changed route metadata and episode duration, while anomaly scoring still used the maximum specialist score.
lessons.lesson: Abstention is operational only when it changes evidence fusion; memory admission and detection routing require separate coverage contracts.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Future routers select or combine specialist scores under a preregistered coverage budget and preserve the independent memory-normality gate.
lessons.authority_boundary: Low contamination on bounded confirmations does not prove general memory safety or transfer.

lessons.observed_event: Coverage-constrained fusion passed every detector and memory gate on a point confirmation but failed catastrophically on an InternalBleeding shape pair.
lessons.diagnosis: Routing can suppress nuisance evidence but cannot create morphology evidence absent from both specialists.
lessons.lesson: Selective fusion may be promoted only within the sensor family that confirms; shape-domain rejection requires a new sensing primitive.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Point selective fusion is retained while morphology-aware shape research proceeds under fresh preregistration.
lessons.authority_boundary: A promotion-quality point result does not authorize UCR-wide transfer.

lessons.observed_event: Single-channel PCA and random-projection predictions collapsed to rank one and broadcast into multi-gigabyte quadratic arrays.
lessons.diagnosis: Estimator output shape was assumed rather than restored to the declared feature dimension.
lessons.lesson: Every baseline must preserve the `(rows, features)` contract, including one-feature datasets.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Codec baseline predictions are reshaped explicitly and covered by single-channel regression tests.
lessons.authority_boundary: Baseline correctness improves comparison integrity but does not prove model capability.

lessons.observed_event: A normal-validation-selected ridge autoregression closed the UCR forecasting gap on both discovery and untouched confirmation without changing anomaly evidence.
lessons.diagnosis: The sparse neural innovation was required to own forecasting even when a stable causal expert generalized better.
lessons.lesson: Compression, anomaly sensing, memory normality, and forecasting may use separate validated experts under one certificate.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Operational forecasting is selected from a bounded causal expert bank using normal validation only, while neural prediction remains visible diagnostically.
lessons.authority_boundary: Modular expert selection does not grant live memory, tool, repair, or autonomous authority.

lessons.observed_event: The validated causal prediction expert could be integrated into the plugin without granting it anomaly, memory-write, tool, or mutation authority.
lessons.diagnosis: Offline transfer and runtime inference previously used different forecasting ownership models.
lessons.lesson: Validated expert boundaries must survive rehydration into the plugin contract with their authority and observability intact.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Plugin inference exposes the selected expert while neural anomaly awareness and host authority locks remain separate.
lessons.authority_boundary: A runnable local sidecar is not validated agent utility or autonomous authority.

lessons.observed_event: A deeper enhanced NAB network preserved strong AUC but failed replay, while the smaller enhanced network lost anomaly ranking.
lessons.diagnosis: Added depth, width, and field gating changed the calibrated latent geometry without guaranteeing memory replay compatibility.
lessons.lesson: Architecture scaling cannot replace dataset-scoped confirmation; supported codecs remain frozen until the full metric bundle transfers.
lessons.future_behavior_change: The original NAB T1 codec remains canonical and enhanced architectures stay diagnostic until replay passes.
lessons.authority_boundary: Strong ranking alone does not authorize codec replacement or memory promotion.

lessons.observed_event: Wrong-target repair won the original ablation through a negligible loss edge despite zero replay support.
lessons.diagnosis: Winner selection ignored replay, warning recall, and false-memory safety.
lessons.lesson: A shadow repair is eligible only after it passes the full prediction, replay, recall, and contamination bundle.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Repair ablations compute eligibility and utility before naming any winner.
lessons.authority_boundary: Winning a shadow ablation does not authorize live repair.

lessons.observed_event: Tessera tied a recency heuristic on synthetic trajectories because the final degraded event exposed an explicit error.
lessons.diagnosis: The benchmark made the target directly observable to a trivial control.
lessons.lesson: Agent utility benchmarks must test precursors and recovery value, not merely explicit failure flags.
lessons.future_behavior_change: The next trajectory trial removes final error leakage and reports safe-memory recall and latency.
lessons.authority_boundary: Synthetic trajectory performance does not prove live agent utility.

lessons.observed_event: Removing explicit failure flags caused recency and summary controls to miss degradation while Tessera detected every synthetic precursor.
lessons.diagnosis: Temporal trajectory structure contains useful pre-failure evidence, but conservative plugin decisions reduce safe-memory recall and add latency.
lessons.lesson: Agent-memory utility must balance precursor recall, false intervention, safe-memory retention, unsafe-memory rejection, and runtime cost.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Captured-trajectory trials preserve all five metrics and compare against recency and summary controls.
lessons.authority_boundary: Synthetic precursor detection does not authorize live monitoring or memory writes.

lessons.observed_event: The privacy-sanitized local benchmark caught both failures by warning on every clean operator session.
lessons.diagnosis: A global continuous normal envelope was applied to sparse categorical phase and state transitions.
lessons.lesson: Trajectory calibration must respect event type and phase; unsafe-memory rejection alone is not useful when safe-memory recall collapses.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Local trajectory work pauses for fresh data collection and phase-conditioned normal calibration.
lessons.authority_boundary: Privacy-safe capture does not authorize live monitoring or payload collection.

lessons.observed_event: Every degraded local prefix exactly duplicated a clean prefix under the privacy-allowed feature contract.
lessons.diagnosis: The retained phase/state sequence contained no information capable of separating failures without false interventions.
lessons.lesson: Identifiability must be audited before calibration; models cannot recover information that sensors never observed.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Trajectory promotion requires a collision audit and fresh safe telemetry before model selection.
lessons.authority_boundary: Sensor enrichment does not authorize payload capture or live monitoring.

lessons.observed_event: Fresh safe elapsed telemetry made the controlled precursor identifiable, but a four-session clean calibration caused one false intervention on replication.
lessons.diagnosis: The signal existed in a completed phase event, but the normal calibration tail was estimated from too few clean sessions.
lessons.lesson: Phase-semantic signals need a separate specialist and enough untouched normal calibration to bound false intervention.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Expand clean calibration, archive the frozen cohort, then report natural-shadow coverage, drift, warning, memory, and abstention metrics.
lessons.authority_boundary: Controlled specialist accuracy does not authorize live intervention, monitoring authority, or memory writes.

lessons.observed_event: Expanded clean calibration eliminated controlled false interventions, but natural full-loop sessions had a different structural workflow profile.
lessons.diagnosis: Phase names reused across workflows do not imply comparable duration distributions or command semantics.
lessons.lesson: A specialist requires both finite-sample normal support and a matching privacy-safe workflow profile before it may cover a decision.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Uncalibrated workflow profiles abstain; each natural profile requires its own immutable clean calibration and later shadow cohort.
lessons.authority_boundary: Profile coverage remains read-only and cannot authorize warnings, intervention, or memory writes.

lessons.observed_event: Independent 5% phase bounds warned on one of eight clean natural sessions, while a session-level split-conformal gate warned on none.
lessons.diagnosis: Phase-local error budgets compounded when any phase exceedance triggered a session warning.
lessons.lesson: When one host action follows many sensor tests, calibrate the combined session decision rather than each test in isolation.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Natural workflow specialists use one preregistered session-level score and preserve sensitivity as a separate unclaimed gate.
lessons.authority_boundary: Clean false-warning control does not imply natural failure sensitivity or authorize host action.

lessons.observed_event: The preregistered natural-profile delay ladder detected no injected delay at 150 ms or below and required 200-250 ms for full response.
lessons.diagnosis: Slow valid calibration sessions inflated the session score threshold and protected specificity at the cost of moderate-delay sensitivity.
lessons.lesson: Specificity and sensitivity must be reported separately; passing a coarse perturbation gate does not establish useful incident detection.
lessons.future_behavior_change: Before recalibration, investigate privacy-safe operational modes and validate any mode split on later clean sessions.
lessons.authority_boundary: Perturbation response does not authorize natural failure claims, host warnings, or interventions.

claim_boundary: Lessons change future repository behavior through validated gates only; they do not self-authorize repair or promotion.
